content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found. I reviewed the 9ni.6.2 prompt-generation changes in the key implementation files (`src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`, related model/adapter updates, and the added CLI/unit coverage) and ran `cargo test --quiet`; the full suite passed.

## Amendments

None.
